mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_item(category_id, name, subtitle, cover_url, shelf_status, stock_mode, stock_qty, last_inbound_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{coverUrl}, #{shelfStatus}, #{stockMode}, #{stockQty}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_item SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, shelf_status = #{shelfStatus}, stock_mode = #{stockMode}, stock_qty = #{stockQty} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE supply_item SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), deleted_by = 'system', purge_after_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_item SET deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, purge_after_time = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM supply_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM supply_item
deleted = 0
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM supply_item WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_item WHERE deleted = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_item SET stock_qty = stock_qty + #{qty}, last_inbound_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock_mode = 'QUANTIFIED'
UPDATE supply_item SET stock_qty = #{newQty} WHERE id = #{id}
